name: garf-core

metadata.name: garf-core
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Abstracts fetching data from API based on provided SQL-like query.

documentation: # gaarf-core - Unified approach for interacting with reporting APIs.

modules.name: garf_core.base_query
documentation:
Module for defining base class for Garf query classes.

Garf query classes can inherit from BaseQuery and have a simple way of
being fetched from API.

methods.name: garf_core.base_query.BaseQuery.query
documentation: Returns expanded query with parameters takes from initialization.

methods.name: garf_core.base_query.BaseQuery.__str__
documentation: Formatted query string representation.

Base class to inherit all Garf queries from.

Attributes:
  query_text: Contains query text or template.

modules.name: garf_core.parsers
documentation:
Module for defining various parsing strategy for GoogleAdsRow elements.

GoogleAdsRowParser parses a single GoogleAdsRow and applies different parsing
strategies to each element of the row.

classes.name: garf_core.parsers.GarfParserError
documentation: Incorrect data format for parser.

modules.name: garf_core.report
documentation:
Simples handling fetched data.

Module exposes two classes:
    * GarfReport - contains all data from API response alongside methods
      for iteration, slicing and converting to/from common structures.
    * GarfRow - helper class for dealing with iteration over each response
      row in GarfReport.
Copyright 2024 Google LLC
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
You may obtain a copy of the License at
https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
limitations under the License.

classes.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.__init__
documentation:
Initializes GarfReport from API response.

Args:
    results: Contains data from Ads API in a form of nested list
    column_names: Maps in each element in sublist of results to name.
    results_placeholder: Optional placeholder values for missing results.
    query_specification: Specification used to get data from Ads API.
    auto_convert_to_scalars: Whether to simplify slicing operations.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.disable_scalar_conversions
documentation:
Disables auto conversions of scalars of reports slices.

Ensures that slicing and indexing operations always return GarfReport or
GarfRow instead of underlying sequences and scalars

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.enable_scalar_conversions
documentation:
Enables auto conversions of scalars of reports slices.

Ensures that slicing and indexing operations might return underlying
sequences and scalars whenever possible.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.to_list
documentation:
Converts report to a list.

Args:
    row_type: Expected type of element in the list.
    flatten: Whether to have a flattened list (nested by default).
    distinct: Whether to perform item deduplication in the list.

Returns:
    List of elements based on the report.

Raises:
    GarfReportError: When incorrect row_type is specified.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.to_dict
documentation:
Converts report to dictionary.

Args:
    key_column: Column of report to serve as a key.
    value_column: Column of report to serve as a value.
    value_column_output: How value column should be represented.

Returns:
    Mapping based on report elements.

Raises:
    GarfReportError: When incorrect column_name specified.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.to_pandas
documentation:
Converts report to Pandas dataframe.

Returns:
    Dataframe from report results and column_names.

Raises:
    ImportError: if pandas are not installed.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.to_json
documentation:
Converts report to JSON.

Returns:
    JSON from report results and column_names.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.get_value
documentation:
Extracts data from report as a scalar.

Raises:
  GarfReportError: If row or column index are out of bounds.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.__len__
documentation: Returns number of rows in the report.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.__iter__
documentation:
Returns GarfRow for each element in GarfReport.

If report contains results_placeholder return None immediately.

Yields:
    GarfRow for each sub-list in the report.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.__bool__
documentation: Checks whether report results is not empty.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.__getitem__
documentation:
Gets data from report based on a key.

Data can be extract from report by rows and columns.
For single column extraction use `report['column_name']` syntax;
for multiple columns extract use `report[['column_1', 'column_2']]`.
For single row extraction use `report[0]` syntax;
for multiple rows extraction use `report[0:2]` syntax.

Args:
  key:
    element to get from report. Could be index, slice or column_name(s).

Returns:
  New GarfReport or GarfRow.

Raises:
    GarfReportError: When incorrect column_name specified.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport._get_rows_slice
documentation:
Gets one or several rows from the report.

Args:
    key: Row(s) to get from report. Could be index or slice.

Returns:
  New GarfReport or GarfRow.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport._get_columns_slice
documentation:
Gets one or several columns from the report.

Args:
  key: Column(s) to get from the report.

Returns:
  New GarfReport or GarfRow.

Raises:
    GarfReportError: When incorrect column_name specified.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.__add__
documentation:
Combines two reports into one.

New report is build from two reports results variable; if either of reports
has results placeholder it's copied into the new report.

Args:
    other: Report to be added to existing report.

Return:
    New GarfReport with combined data.

Raises:
    GarfReportError:
        When columns are different or added instance is not GarfReport.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfReport.from_pandas
documentation:
Builds GarfReport from pandas dataframe.

Args:
    df: Pandas dataframe to build report from.

Returns:
    Report build from dataframe data and columns.

Raises:
    ImportError: If pandas library not installed.

Provides convenient handler for working with results from API.

Attributes:
    results: Contains data from API in a form of nested list
    column_names: Maps in each element in sublist of results to name.
    results_placeholder: Optional placeholder values for missing results.
    query_specification: Specification used to get data from API.
    auto_convert_to_scalars: Whether to simplify slicing operations.

classes.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.__init__
documentation:
Initializes new GarfRow.

data: ...
column_names: ...

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.to_dict
documentation: Maps column names to corresponding data point.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.get_value
documentation:
Extracts data from row as a scalar.

Raises:
  GarfReportError: If column index is out of bounds.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.__getattr__
documentation:
Gets element from row as an attribute.

Args:
    element: Name of an attribute.

Returns:
    Found element.

Raises:
    AttributeError: If attribute is not in column_names.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.__getitem__
documentation:
Gets element from row by index.

Args:
    element: index of value.

Returns:
    Found element.

Raises:
    GarfReportError: If element not found in the position.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.__setattr__
documentation:
Sets new value for an attribute.

Args:
    name: Attribute name.
    value: New values of an attribute.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.__setitem__
documentation:
Sets new value by index.

Args:
    name: Column name.
    value: New values of an element.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.get
documentation:
Extracts value as dictionary get operation.

Args:
    item: Column name of a value to be extracted from the row.

Returns:
    Found value.

methods.name: garf_core.report.GarfRow.__iter__
documentation: Yields each element of a row.

Helper class to simplify iteration of GarfReport.

Attributes:
    data: ...
    column_names: ...

classes.name: garf_core.report.GarfReportError
documentation: Base exception for Garf reports.

modules.name: garf_core.report_fetcher
documentation:
Module for getting data from Ads API based on a query.

AdsReportFetcher performs fetching data from Ads API, parsing it
  and returning GarfReport.
Copyright 2024 Google LLf
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
You may obtain a copy of the License at
https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
limitations under the License.

classes.name: garf_core.report_fetcher.ApiReportFetcher

methods.name: garf_core.report_fetcher.ApiReportFetcher.__init__
documentation:
Instantiates AdsReportFetcher based on provided api client.

Args:
  api_client: Instantiated GoogleAdsClient or GoogleAdsApiClient.
  parser: Parser.

methods.name: garf_core.report_fetcher.ApiReportFetcher.afetch
documentation:
Asynchronously fetches data from Ads API based on query_specification.

Args:
    query_specification: Query text that will be passed to Ads API
        alongside column_names, customizers and virtual columns.
    args: Arguments that need to be passed to the query.

Returns:
    GarfReport with results of query execution.

methods.name: garf_core.report_fetcher.ApiReportFetcher.fetch
documentation:
Fetches data from Ads API based on query_specification.

Args:
    query_specification: Query text that will be passed to Ads API
        alongside column_names, customizers and virtual columns.
    args: Arguments that need to be passed to the query.

Returns:
    GarfReport with results of query execution.

Raises:
    GarfExecutorException:
        When customer_ids are not provided or Ads API returned error.

Class responsible for getting data from Ads API.

Attributes:
    api_client: a client used for connecting to Ads API.

classes.name: garf_core.query_editor.ProcessedField

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.ProcessedField.from_raw
documentation:
Process field to extract possible customizers.

Args:
    raw_field: Unformatted field string value.

Returns:
    ProcessedField that contains formatted field with customizers.

Helper class to store fields with its customizers.

Attributes:
  field: Extractable field.
  customizer_type: Type of customizer to be applied to the field.
  customizer_value: Value to be used in customizer.

classes.name: garf_core.query_editor.VirtualColumn

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.VirtualColumn.from_raw
documentation: Converts a field to virtual column.

Represents element in Garf query that either calculated or plugged-in.

Virtual columns allow performing basic manipulation with metrics and
dimensions (i.e. division or multiplication) as well as adding raw text
values directly into report.

Attributes:
  type: Type of virtual column, either build-in or expression.
  value: Value of the field after macro expansion.
  fields: Possible fields participating in calculations.
  substitute_expression: Formatted expression.

classes.name: garf_core.query_editor.ExtractedLineElements
documentation:
Helper class for parsing query lines.

Attributes:
  fields: All fields extracted from the line.
  alias: Optional alias assign to a field.
  virtual_column: Optional virtual column extracted from query line.
  customizer: Optional values for customizers associated with a field.

classes.name: garf_core.query_editor.BaseQueryElements

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.BaseQueryElements.request
documentation: API request.

Contains raw query and parsed elements.

Attributes:
    query_title: Title of the query that needs to be parsed.
    query_text: Text of the query that needs to be parsed.
    resource_name: Name of Google Ads API reporting resource.
    fields: Ads API fields that need to be fetched.
    column_names: Friendly names for fields which are used when saving data
    column_names: Friendly names for fields which are used when saving data
    customizers: Attributes of fields that need to be be extracted.
    virtual_columns: Attributes of fields that need to be be calculated.
    is_constant_resource: Whether resource considered a constant one.
    is_builtin_query: Whether query is built-in.

classes.name: garf_core.query_editor.CommonParametersMixin

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.CommonParametersMixin.common_params
documentation: Instantiates common parameters to the current values.
Helper mixin to inject set of common parameters to all queries.

classes.name: garf_core.query_editor.QuerySpecification

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.QuerySpecification.__init__
documentation:
Instantiates QuerySpecification based on text, title and optional args.

Args:
  text: Query text.
  title: Query title.
  args: Optional parameters to be dynamically injected into query text.
  api_version: Version of Google Ads API.

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.QuerySpecification.macros
documentation: Returns macros with injected common parameters.

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.QuerySpecification.expand
documentation: Applies necessary transformations to query.

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.QuerySpecification.remove_comments
documentation: Removes comments and converts text to lines.

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.QuerySpecification.extract_resource_name
documentation:
Finds resource_name in query_text.

Returns:
  Found resource.

Raises:
  GarfResourceException: If resource_name isn't found.

methods.name: garf_core.query_editor.QuerySpecification._extract_query_lines
documentation:
Helper for extracting fields with aliases from query text.

Yields:
  Line in query between SELECT and FROM statements.

Simplifies fetching data from API and its further parsing.

Attributes:
  text: Query text.
  title: Query title.
  args: Optional parameters to be dynamically injected into query text.
  api_version: Version of Google Ads API.
